name: phase3-new-session-checklist
description: Print Phase 3 orientation checklist at the start of a new session

action.message:
New session started on phase-3-adaptive-visual-navigation. Quick orientation:

KEY FILES:
- camera_stream.py — background MJPEG consumer, SOI/EOI marker extraction
- vision_assessor.py — Nova Pro Converse API wrapper, VisionDecision dataclass
- camera_policy.py — CameraPolicy(NavigationPolicy), create_camera_policy() factory
- deepracer_agent_tool.py — vision loop: _should_assess(), _assess_and_decide(), _execute_approved_plan()
- agent.py — Phase 2 planning + Phase 3 vision constants (VISION_ASSESS_TIMEOUT, MAX_REPLANS)
- app_ui.py — /frame, /vision_status, /reinit, /camera/reconnect routes

PHASE 3 ENV VARS:
- VISION_MODEL (default: us.amazon.nova-pro-v1:0)
- MAX_REPLANS (default: 3)
- VISION_TIMEOUT (default: 4.0 s)
- VISION_MIN_STEP (default: 0.5 s)

RUNNING:
- python main.py --vision   (Phase 3 with camera)
- python main.py --mock     (offline, no vision)
- python app_ui.py          (web UI)

SAFETY: Camera is advisory — failures never abort execution. Vision timeout always returns 'continue'.
